tool_input.command:
node --input-type=commonjs -e 'const run=(n,l)=>new Promise(r=>{const t=require("./transaction").createTransaction();for(const x of l)t.add_data(Buffer.from(x,"utf8"));t.end_data(()=>{console.log("---",n,"subject=",JSON.stringify(t.header.get("subject")),"from=",JSON.stringify(t.header.get("from")));t.message_stream.get_data(d=>{console.log("MSG=",JSON.stringify(d.toString()));r()})})});(async()=>{await run("malformed mid-header",["Received: from x
","This is not a header
","Subject: hello
","From: a@b.com
","
","the body
"]);await run("empty",[])})()'
